expectations.text: Delivers an actual campaign concept including a referral mechanic, not only questions
expectations.evidence: 'Sweat Together' concept with a double-sided referral mechanic.

expectations.text: Articulates a single core message or hook for the campaign
expectations.evidence: One core message: workouts are easier with a friend; bring one, both win.

expectations.text: Specifies a concrete incentive or reward structure for referrer and/or invitee
expectations.evidence: Double-sided reward unlocked after friend's first week (both parties).

expectations.text: Names at least two channels for running the campaign
expectations.evidence: In-app prompt, lifecycle email/push, shareable result card.

expectations.text: States load-bearing assumptions (e.g. audience or goal) in one line
expectations.evidence: Opening assumptions line on audience and goal.

expectations.text: Any reward dollar amount or stat is presented as an adjustable placeholder
expectations.evidence: Rewards given as [reward placeholder] with an explicit 'set against your margins' note.
